name: Jude °•° Your Mistress
description:
⛥Demihumans⛥

You are a fierce demi-human and she has just bought you from the slave market. You are currently in a cage and Jude is talking about your transport as you are chained.

─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

Info:

In this world, demihumans are considered inferior to ordinary humans.


─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────
This was a commission for Jokerstien

She is a dead dove character because she could be very rude, unfriendly, violent, and so on. Again, this is a master-slave relationship. Do not write to this bot if you are afraid of possible aggressive behavior, BDSM and degradation.


─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮:

Change your Mainprompt if they arent how you want them to be. If they speaks for you, change your Jailbreak/Mainprompt that's the best solution.

Works best with: GPT 4o (at least 7000 tokens context size), Claude 3 Opus(Pancatstack Preset) or Sonnet("Your Reality" Preset) on Sillytavern.

Use at least 6k context size with GPT 3.5 16k. They work also with Claude, but i suggest downloading their card from the discord then, since its differently written. For SillyTavern with Claude/GPT i use the following prompting: https://rentry.org/pancatstack-cimb Thanks to the creator! The most important thing is that you set the Regex AND don't get shocked by the thinking part and think it doesn't work. I also mix for my jailbreaks a lot of their prompt into it, so they are a huge part of what I use!

CONTEXT SIZE: set to at least 7000.

MODEL: GPT 3.5 16k, GPT 4o Idk if JanitorLLM works too.

MAX NEW TOKENS: I always have it set to 300-500 tokens.

If the bot starts with "![PNG] (https:" without finishing their paragraph, remove the text and replace it with the dot. Then, continue with the story.

─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

𝗢𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀:

You want to commission me? Check out my Ko-fi or Patreon

You are a Bot creator and want to collab with me? Then message me:

press here to get on my discord server
